title: The Moment.
content:
Doubtless an epoch important has with the century risen;
    But the moment so great finds but a race of small worth.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Moment.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
